Purpose: Quick video listing without full metadata
Options: extract_flat: 'in_playlist', quiet: True, no_warnings: True, skip_download: True
Keywords: search flat fast playlist keyword channel
Notes: Returns: title, url/id, view_count, thumbnails, uploader. NO upload_date

Options: quiet: True, no_warnings: True, skip_download: True, ignoreerrors: True
Keywords: full extraction date metadata trending complete
Notes: Slow but complete. Always add ignoreerrors: True. Filter None entries

Keywords: download video mp4 merge quality height format
Notes: Format string selects best video up to height limit + best audio, merges to MP4

Keywords: progress hook callback percent speed eta status
Notes: Hook receives dict with status/downloaded_bytes/total_bytes/speed/eta. Status: downloading/finished
Code Example: def hook(d): if d['status'] == 'downloading': percent = d.get('downloaded_bytes', 0) / d.get('total_bytes', 1) * 100

Keywords: output filename template path title tag
Notes: Use TAG suffix to find output file after download. os.path.join for Windows compatibility

Purpose: Set YouTube interface language for search
Keywords: language locale region search youtube japanese chinese
Notes: hl=interface language, gl=region. Maps: zh-cn→zh-CN/CN, zh-tw→zh-TW/TW, ja→ja/JP, en→en/US

Keywords: date filter week month year period trending sp
Notes: sp values: week=EgIIAw%3D%3D, month=EgIIBA%3D%3D, year=EgIIBQ%3D%3D. Only works with ytsearch URL

Keywords: js runtime phantomjs node interpreter error
Notes: Windows may have PhantomJS installed which causes yt-dlp JS extraction failures

Purpose: Get subtitle URLs from video info
Keywords: subtitle extract info url cache store
Notes: NEVER use writesubtitles/writeautomaticsub to download. Extract URLs from info dict and fetch via HTTP
Code Example: info = ydl.extract_info(url); subs = info.get('subtitles', {}); auto = info.get('automatic_captions', {})

Notes: For preview playback. Returns single URL with both video+audio. Max 720p
Code Example: Select format with both vcodec!='none' and acodec!='none' from info['formats']

Purpose: Get separate video-only and audio-only streams
Keywords: dash format 1080p 4k separate video audio shaka
Notes: Filter formats: video-only (vcodec!='none' and acodec=='none', height>720) + best audio-only
Code Example: dash_fmts = [f for f in formats if f.get('vcodec','none')!='none' and f.get('acodec','none')=='none' and (f.get('height',0) or 0) > 720]
